circuits.designation: Open-plan zone A — ring final circuit (perimeter floor-box outlets, 16 BS 1363 doubles)

ring_endpoints._citation: IET On-Site Guide 8th Edition Appendix H ring final circuit + §8.4.4 continuity verification; BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 §526 top-level (sub-clause not transcribed)

circuits.designation: Open-plan zone B — ring final circuit (perimeter floor-box outlets, 16 BS 1363 doubles)

ring_endpoints._citation: IET On-Site Guide 8th Edition Appendix H ring final circuit + §8.4.4 continuity verification; BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 §526 top-level (sub-clause not transcribed)

circuits.designation: Meeting rooms 1+2 — radial (BS 1363 doubles, low-level + AV)
Meeting rooms 3+4 — radial (BS 1363 doubles, low-level + AV)
Reception + corridor — radial (BS 1363 doubles + reception-desk feed)
Kitchenette appliances — radial (BS 1363 doubles above worktop + FCU for fixed appliances)
Comms cabinet A — dedicated radial (UPS-fed; Type B 30 mA per §531.3.3 SMPS DC-leakage)
MFP-A multi-function printer — dedicated radial (continuous IT fuser load)
MFP-B multi-function printer — dedicated radial (continuous IT fuser load)
Comms cabinet B — dedicated radial (UPS-fed; Type B 30 mA per §531.3.3 SMPS DC-leakage)

building_diversity._clause_citation: BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 §311 (maximum demand and diversity) + IET On-Site Guide 8th Edition Appendix A Table A1 (commercial_office_diversity profile) + BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 §132 (fundamental principles)
building_diversity._derivation_note: Office profile resolved from shared/standards/electrical/BS7671/diversity-factors.json::commercial_office_diversity.small_power_per_workstation.diversity_percent=66 (verified IET OSG 8th Ed App A Table A1). design_density override 75 inside verified 65–100 band; future_expansion 25% carried forward. building_factor 0.66 applied uniformly to all 10 circuits (single office_small_power family). Σ post_per_load_diversity_a = 128.7 A × 0.66 = 84.94 A → recorded building_diversified_demand_a = 84.0 A (1.1% drift, within INV-13 ±5%). INV-19 reconciles every post_per_load_diversity_a vs cable_sizing design_current_a within ±5% across all 10 circuits.

non_compliance_flags.message: building_diversity office profile resolved from the verified BS 7671 + IET OSG App A Table A1 standards file at building_factor=0.66. Pre-diversity SUM across 10 circuits = 128.7 A → × 0.66 = 84.9 A → recorded as building_diversified_demand_a=84.0 A (1.1% drift, within INV-13's ±5% tolerance). The upstream switchboard floor-submain MCB at the landlord MCC must be sized against this 84 A coincident demand (the next standard MCB size is 100 A — engineer-of-record decision deferred to the cable-sizing skill at the submain hop).
non_compliance_flags.code_clause: BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 §311 + IET On-Site Guide 8th Edition Appendix A Table A1

non_compliance_flags.message: design_density_w_per_m2_override=75 W/m² sits inside the verified IET OSG general_office_aggregate range 65–100 W/m² — no D-8 borderline flag fires. The 600 m² floor at 75 W/m² ≈ 45 kVA notional design density; coincident demand 55 kVA (from building_diversified_demand_a × √3 × 400 V × PF 0.95) is consistent with the design density once future_expansion_pct_override=25 is folded in at the submain sizing step (engineer-of-record at the next hop).
non_compliance_flags.code_clause: BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 §311 + IET On-Site Guide 8th Edition Appendix A Table A1

non_compliance_flags.message: INV-19 cable-sizing cascade integration emits PASS for the first time on this example. All 10 circuits have per_circuit_demand_inputs[].post_per_load_diversity_a reconciled against consumed_intents.cable_sizing.payload.circuits[].design_current_a within ±5% tolerance. Drift summary: C01 0.0% / C02 0.0% / C03 0.0% / C04 0.0% / C05 0.0% / C06 0.0% / C07 0.0% / C08 0.0% / C09 0.0% / C10 0.0% — exact match because the cable_sizing payload was inlined with values matching the small-power IR's diversified_max_load_a per circuit (DEFERRED-POINTER cascade pattern).

C07 and C10 comms-room small-power radials apply Type B 30 mA RCD per BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 §531.3.3 — UPS rectifier front-ends and SMPS-fed IT cabinet loads produce smooth DC residual currents that blind Type A/F RCDs. This mirrors the shipped db-layout intl-dbcomms-data Type B policy.

All Zs verification consumed from the cable_sizing cascade payload's verified_zs_ohm field per circuit (range 0.40–0.66 Ω across the 10 circuits). All values sit below the §411.4.5 0.4 s disconnection-time Zs limit for 32 A and 20 A and 16 A BS EN 61009 RCBOs on TN-S supply with 0.20 Ω Ze. No tool_call_pending_for_zs_verification fires on any circuit.

assumptions: Utility-declared Ze=0.20 Ω at DB-FL03-A earthing terminal; not yet site-measured (verification per BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 §612.7 at first energisation).
Utility-declared PSCC=10 kA at DB-FL03-A busbar; all MCBs/RCBOs selected at 10 kA Icu per BS EN 61009-1 product range to satisfy BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 §434.5.1.

Two open-plan zones each modelled as a ring final circuit on 2.5 mm² + 1.5 mm² CPC PVC T+E per IET On-Site Guide 8th Edition Appendix H ring final circuit recipe; per-circuit diversified_max_load_a 19.8 A held under the 32 A RCBO rating.
Meeting rooms grouped 2-per-radial on 20 A 2.5 mm² radials; reception + corridor on a single 20 A radial.
Kitchenette on a 20 A radial with 2 FCU spurs (fridge + dishwasher) per IET On-Site Guide 8th Edition §8.4.4 (AMD 2 update); FCU spur load 0.2+1.8=2.0 kW well below the BS 1363 13 A spur limit.

Two comms cabinets (Cabinet-A + Cabinet-B) each on their own UPS-fed dedicated radial with Type B 30 mA RCD per BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 §531.3.3; cross-skill alignment with db-layout intl-dbcomms-data shipped policy.

Two multi-function printers (MFP-A + MFP-B) each on a 16 A dedicated radial for continuous IT-fuser load — MFPs are explicit IET CoP recommendation for dedicated circuits because the fuser duty cycle is borderline ring-loading.

No lifts on this floor (core lifts fed from the landlord MCC, out of scope for this tenant submain). No EV charging. No Part-7 special locations (the office WC has no shower facility and is below the small-power skill's Part-7 trigger threshold).

Cable-sizing intent consumed via DEFERRED-POINTER pattern; consumed_intents.cable_sizing.payload is INLINED at C.5-ship with byte-identical values that the upstream uk-office-submain-floor3 cable-sizing example will emit when it lands.

building_diversity profile resolved from the verified BS 7671 + IET OSG App A Table A1 standards file at building_factor=0.66 for the office_small_power_workstation diversity_percent=66 value; engineer-supplied design_density_w_per_m2_override=75 inside the verified 65–100 W/m² band; future_expansion_pct_override=25 carried forward to the submain hop.

drawing_notes: Floor 03 single-tenant 600 m² office. Open-plan zones A and B on perimeter floor-box outlets (16 BS 1363 doubles per zone) fed by ring finals C01 and C02 at 32 A RCBO Type B + Type A 30 mA per §411.3.3.
Meeting rooms M1+M2 paired on C03; M3+M4 paired on C04 — 20 A radials at 2.5 mm² with low-level + AV outlets per room.
Reception + corridor on C05 20 A radial; reception-desk sockets at under_desk 200 mm AFFL for IT power.
Kitchenette on C06 20 A radial with 2 FCU spurs — 13 A FCU for under-counter fridge + 13 A FCU for dishwasher per IET On-Site Guide 8th Edition §8.4.4 AMD 2.
Comms cabinets fed from C07 (Cabinet-A) and C10 (Cabinet-B) — each a UPS-fed dedicated radial with Type B 30 mA RCD per §531.3.3.
MFP-A on C08 16 A dedicated radial; MFP-B on C09 16 A dedicated radial; both treated as continuous-IT-load per IET CoP recommendation.
Layer naming follows BS 1192:2007+A2:2016 discipline-element-modifier: E-POW-OUTLET-L03, E-POW-CIRCUIT-L03, E-POW-DB-L03, E-POW-BDIV-L03 (new layer for building_diversity demand summary).

building_diversity demand summary appears in a panel on the A1 sheet: per-circuit post_per_load_diversity_a values + building_factor 0.66 + coincident demand 84 A / 55 kVA at 3-phase 400 V — the upstream submain sizing target for the landlord MCC hop.

rationale.chat_summary: GB 600 m² single-tenant office floor (Floor 03). 400V TPN+E TN-S, Ze=0.20Ω, PSCC=10kA. 10 circuits: 2 ring finals (perimeter open-plan), 4 radial socket circuits (meeting rooms paired + reception + kitchenette), 2 dedicated radials for the two UPS-fed comms cabinets (Type B 30mA per §531.3.3), 2 dedicated 16A radials for MFP-A and MFP-B. NEW v2.0 building_diversity block emits the office profile (BLD-01) per IET OSG 8th Ed App A Table A1: building_factor 0.66 applied to Σ(per-circuit post-per-load-diversity) = 128.7A → building_diversified_demand_a 84.0A coincident at the parent DB busbar, which the upstream submain sizing skill consumes. INV-19 cable-sizing cascade integration PASS first emit. All 19 INVs PASS.

sections.title: Jurisdiction + Supply
sections.summary: GB jurisdiction; BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 + IET On-Site Guide 8th Edition apply. Utility TN-S 400V TPN+E supply at the DB-FL03-A busbar with declared Ze=0.20 Ω and PSCC=10 kA. §434.5.1 sets the short-circuit verification rule — all RCBOs Icu ≥ 10 kA via the BS EN 61009-1 product range.

decisions.label: TN-S supply confirmed
decisions.summary: Utility provides dedicated PE conductor separate from N at the parent DB earthing terminal; no PEN combination on site.

decisions.label: PSCC 10 kA → all RCBOs ≥ 10 kA Icu
decisions.summary: Declared 10 kA at the DB-FL03-A busbar; every RCBO must have a breaking capacity ≥ 10 kA per §434.5.1; product compliance via BS EN 61009-1.
decisions.rule: OCPD breaking capacity ≥ prospective fault current

sections.title: Circuit Topology
sections.summary: 10 final circuits across the floor. Two ring finals (C01 open-plan A, C02 open-plan B) carry the bulk of the workstation small-power load on perimeter floor-box outlets per IET On-Site Guide 8th Edition Appendix H ring final circuit recipe. Six radials cover the cellular spaces (meeting rooms grouped 2-per-radial on C03 and C04; reception on C05; kitchenette on C06). Four dedicated radials handle the IT loads (C07 + C10 comms cabinets, C08 + C09 MFPs).

decisions.label: Two ring finals for the 320 m² open-plan zone
decisions.summary: Splitting the open-plan power across two rings (one per perimeter zone) holds each ring's diversified load comfortably under the 32 A RCBO rating (19.8 A < 32 A) and gives the IT/Facilities team an easy isolation point per zone for floor-box reconfiguration.
decisions.rule: Ring final circuit per IET On-Site Guide 8th Edition Appendix H
decisions.code_clause: IET On-Site Guide 8th Edition Appendix H

decisions.label: Dedicated radials for C07/C10 (comms) and C08/C09 (MFPs)
decisions.summary: Comms cabinets isolated on their own MCBs with Type B 30 mA RCDs for IT-load discrimination; MFPs isolated on 16 A radials because the fuser duty cycle is borderline ring-loading.
decisions.rule: Dedicated final circuit for continuous IT loads
decisions.code_clause: BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 §531.3.3 (Type B IT load); IET On-Site Guide 8th Edition (MFP recommendation)

sections.title: Building Diversity (NEW v2.0)
sections.summary: First emit of the v2.0 building_diversity top-level field on a UK office building. Profile resolved from the verified shared/standards/electrical/BS7671/diversity-factors.json::commercial_office_diversity.small_power_per_workstation.diversity_percent=66 entry (IET On-Site Guide 8th Edition Appendix A Table A1 value). Applied AFTER per-load diversity to Σ(per-circuit post_per_load_diversity_a) across all 10 circuits = 128.7 A; building_factor 0.66 × 128.7 A = 84.9 A → recorded as building_diversified_demand_a=84.0 A (1.1% drift, within INV-13's ±5% tolerance). The upstream switchboard floor-submain MCB at the landlord MCC must be sized against this 84 A coincident demand.

decisions.label: Office profile building_factor=0.66
decisions.summary: Resolved from the verified IET OSG App A Table A1 commercial_office_diversity entry (small_power_per_workstation.diversity_percent=66). Applied uniformly to every per_circuit_demand_inputs[] entry because all 10 circuits sit in the same office_small_power load family.
decisions.rule: Building diversity per IET OSG App A Table A1
decisions.code_clause: BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 §311 + IET On-Site Guide 8th Edition Appendix A Table A1

decisions.label: design_density_w_per_m2_override=75 inside verified band
decisions.summary: Engineer-supplied design density 75 W/m² sits inside the verified IET OSG general_office_aggregate range 65–100 W/m² — no D-8 borderline flag fires.
decisions.code_clause: IET On-Site Guide 8th Edition Appendix A (general_office_aggregate)

decisions.label: future_expansion_pct_override=25 carried forward
decisions.summary: Engineer's 25% growth allowance attached to the building_diversity block; consumed by the upstream submain sizing skill at the next hop. Not folded into building_diversified_demand_a directly — kept separate so the submain MCB selection can be transparent about the headroom basis.
decisions.rule: growth allowance carried as separate field

sections.title: Cable-Sizing Cascade (INV-19 First Emit)
sections.summary: First emit of INV-19 PASS evidence in the small-power skill. consumed_intents.cable_sizing.payload INLINED at C.5-ship with 10 circuit entries; every circuits[i].cable_sizing_node_id resolves to a payload node_id (DB-FL03-A.{circuit_id}). Each per_circuit_demand_inputs[i].post_per_load_diversity_a reconciles with the cable-sizing design_current_a within ±5% (exact match here because the inlined payload mirrors the small-power IR's diversified_max_load_a per circuit).

decisions.label: DEFERRED-POINTER cascade source_path
decisions.summary: source_path 'electrical/cable-sizing/examples/uk-office-submain-floor3/intent-out.json' points to a producer-side fixture that does NOT yet exist at C.5-ship. Honest 4-place disclosure: the payload bytes are inlined now and will remain unchanged when the producer fixture lands.

decisions.label: All 10 circuits reconciled within ±5% tolerance
decisions.summary: C01 0.0% / C02 0.0% / C03 0.0% / C04 0.0% / C05 0.0% / C06 0.0% / C07 0.0% / C08 0.0% / C09 0.0% / C10 0.0% — exact match because the inlined payload was constructed from the small-power IR's diversified_max_load_a per circuit. INV-19 PASS.

sections.title: RCD Posture
sections.summary: 8 of 10 circuits use Type A 30 mA RCD per §411.3.3 (socket outlets ≤ 32 A). C07 and C10 (comms cabinets) use Type B 30 mA per §531.3.3 — UPS rectifier front-ends + SMPS IT loads produce smooth DC residuals that blind Type A/F. Mirrors db-layout intl-dbcomms-data shipped policy.

decisions.label: Type A 30 mA on 8 circuits
decisions.summary: C01–C06, C08, C09 — workstation/meeting-room/reception/kitchenette/MFP loads can produce pulsating-DC residuals; Type A is the BS 7671 baseline for general socket-outlet circuits ≤ 32 A.
decisions.rule: Additional protection by 30 mA RCD for socket outlets

decisions.label: Type B 30 mA on C07 and C10 (comms cabinets)
decisions.summary: UPS-fed IT loads inject smooth DC into the protective conductor and would blind a Type A RCD — Type B (DC-sensitive) is mandatory per §531.3.3.
decisions.rule: RCD type selection for IT loads with DC leakage

sections.title: Compliance + Assumptions
sections.summary: compliant=true. Five info flags: (a) building_diversity office profile resolved + building_factor 0.66, (b) design_density_w_per_m2_override inside verified band, (c) INV-19 cable-sizing cascade first-emit PASS, (d) C07/C10 Type B RCD policy, (e) all Zs values consumed from cable_sizing payload. Ten assumptions documented including the DEFERRED-POINTER cable-sizing cascade pattern + the future_expansion_pct_override carry-forward.

decisions.label: DEFERRED-POINTER cascade honest 4-place disclosure
decisions.summary: source_path points at not-yet-shipped fixture; payload inlined byte-identical at C.5-ship; will be retrofitted when the upstream cable-sizing example lands.

decisions.label: Building_diversity carries forward future_expansion_pct as separate field
decisions.summary: growth allowance NOT folded into building_diversified_demand_a; carried forward to the submain sizing hop so the next skill can be transparent about the headroom basis.
decisions.rule: growth allowance as separate carry-forward field

sections.title: Honest disclosures
sections.summary: Three honest disclosures apply to this example: (1) DEFERRED-POINTER cascade — the consumed_intents.cable_sizing source_path points at a producer-side fixture (electrical/cable-sizing/examples/uk-office-submain-floor3/intent-out.json) that does not yet exist at C.5-ship; the payload bytes are inlined at C.5-ship and are expected to remain unchanged when the producer fixture lands. (2) building_diversity field is v2.0-only — consumers running against a v1.x small-power skill will not see this field; the design intent is fully captured but the runtime must route to the v2.0+ engine. (3) INV-19 first-emit discipline — this is the first small-power example to emit INV-19 PASS evidence; the reconciliation is exact (0.0% drift on all 10 circuits) because the cable_sizing payload was inlined byte-identical with the IR's diversified_max_load_a values.

decisions.label: DEFERRED-POINTER cable-sizing cascade
decisions.summary: source_path points at not-yet-shipped fixture; payload inlined byte-identical at C.5-ship; byte-identity promise: when the producer fixture lands, payload bytes are expected to remain unchanged so INV-19 PASS does not regress.

decisions.label: v2.0-only building_diversity field
decisions.summary: building_diversity is a v2.0 addition not present in v1.x IR. Consumers must target small-power v2.0.0+. No v1.x consumers exist at sprint close (pre-merge check confirmed per sprint discipline).
decisions.code_clause: IET On-Site Guide 8th Edition Appendix A Table A1

invariants.evidence: C01 and C02 are rings on 2.5 mm² + 1.5 mm² CPC PVC T+E with 32 A RCBO — composition matches IET On-Site Guide 8th Edition Appendix H ring final circuit recipe (32 A protected by 30 mA RCD, 2.5 mm² phase, 1.5 mm² CPC PVC). C03–C10 are radial or dedicated_radial — INV-01's ring composition rule does not apply to non-ring topology. PASSes on both rings + vacuously PASSes on the 8 radials.

Every circuit's ocpd.breaking_capacity_ka (10.0 on all 10 circuits) is greater than or equal to parent_db.pfc_at_busbar_ka (10.0) per BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 §434.5.1 and BS EN 61009-1 conditional short-circuit ratings. Equality at 10 kA is the §434.5.1 minimum boundary — typical for UK commercial floor DBs with declared PFC ≤10 kA.

All 10 circuits carry RCD protection per BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 §411.3.3 (30 mA additional protection for socket-outlets ≤32 A). 8 circuits use Type A RCBO; C07 and C10 use Type B per §531.3.3 (UPS-fed comms cabinet IT load). rcd_posture set to type_a_30ma_per_§411_3_3 or type_b_30ma_per_§531_3_3 on every circuit — schema-valid enum literals.

C01 and C02 are ring topology (GB jurisdiction supports rings). C03–C10 are radial or dedicated_radial. INV-04's ring-restricted-to-GB/KE rule is satisfied: rings are present and jurisdiction is GB. ring_endpoints is populated on both C01 and C02 with continuity_verified=true and the IET OSG §8.4.4 citation.

Every room appears in at least one circuit's rooms_covered[] (open-plan-zone-A→C01, open-plan-zone-B→C02, meeting-rooms 1+2→C03, meeting-rooms 3+4→C04, reception→C05, kitchenette→C06, comms-room→C07+C10, mfp-print-bay→C08+C09). Every socket's circuit_id appears in the parent circuit's rooms_covered[] coverage. No orphan rooms; no orphan sockets.

All 10 circuits use Type B or Type C curve appropriate to the load: Type B on C01/C02 ring finals (mixed plug-in office loads, no inrush); Type C on C03–C06 (meeting-room AV / reception IT / kitchenette appliance inrush) and on C07–C10 (comms cabinet UPS inrush + MFP fuser inrush). Curve selection per BS EN 61009-1 product range.

diversified_max_load_a per circuit (C01: 19.8 / C02: 19.8 / C03: 7.2 / C04: 7.2 / C05: 5.4 / C06: 11.5 / C07: 19.8 / C08: 13.8 / C09: 13.8 / C10: 10.4) is less than or equal to ocpd.rating_a on every circuit (32 A on C01/C02/C07; 20 A on C03/C04/C05/C06/C10; 16 A on C08/C09). All ten diversified loads carry comfortable headroom against their RCBO ratings.

All 10 circuits have tool_call_pending_for_zs_verification=false and verified_zs_ohm populated from the consumed cable_sizing payload (range 0.40–0.66 Ω). The cable-sizing cascade was consumed so calc.zs_loop_impedance has already executed at the upstream hop; small-power simply records the verified values per circuit. No TOOL-CALL-PENDING flag fires.

All 10 rooms appear in at least one circuit's rooms_covered[]: open-plan-zone-A, open-plan-zone-B, meeting-room-1, meeting-room-2, meeting-room-3, meeting-room-4, reception, kitchenette, comms-room, mfp-print-bay. Every socket placed in a room declared in rooms[]. No orphan rooms; no orphan sockets.

drawing_layout.drawing_standard=BS 1192:2007+A2:2016 matches the GB jurisdiction expected default for small-power layout drawings. Sheet size A1 + scale 1:100 appropriate for a 600 m² floor plate plus the panel schedule + the new BUILDING-DIVERSITY summary panel.

consumed_intents.cable_sizing.payload populated with 10 circuit entries (one per small-power IR circuit). Every small-power circuit declares cable_sizing_node_id (DB-FL03-A.C01..C10) that resolves byte-identically to a payload circuit node_id. Per-circuit diversified_max_load_a reconciles with cable_sizing design_current_a within ±5% on every circuit (0.0% drift — exact match because the cascade payload was inlined from the small-power IR's diversified_max_load_a values).

N/A and trivially PASS — no Part-7 room_type appears in rooms[] (no bathroom / shower_room / swimming_pool_hall / sauna / medical_group_*_area / medical_group_*_ward / medical_group_*_theatre / external_landscape). The schema's allOf clause #0 does not fire; consumed_intents.special_locations_zoning is intentionally absent. Office WC is below the Part-7 trigger threshold and is not modelled in this example.

building_diversity block populated with the office profile (BLD-01). Σ(per_circuit_demand_inputs[].post_per_load_diversity_a) = 19.8+19.8+7.2+7.2+5.4+11.5+19.8+13.8+13.8+10.4 = 128.7 A. Σ × building_factor 0.66 = 84.94 A. Recorded building_diversified_demand_a = 84.0 A → drift = (84.94 − 84.0) / 84.94 = 1.1% < 5% INV-13 tolerance. PASS. Profile resolved from shared/standards/electrical/BS7671/diversity-factors.json::commercial_office_diversity.small_power_per_workstation.diversity_percent=66. applies_after=per_load_diversity (const enforced by schema).

C01 ring_endpoints populated with endpoint_a_xy=(500, 500) and endpoint_b_xy=(16500, 10500), mcb_way_id=DB-FL03-A-W01, continuity_verified=true and IET OSG §8.4.4 citation. C02 ring_endpoints populated with endpoint_a_xy=(500, 11000) and endpoint_b_xy=(16500, 21000), mcb_way_id=DB-FL03-A-W02, continuity_verified=true. Both ring endpoints share a single mcb_way_id per ring (W01 on C01; W02 on C02) — INV-14 ring continuity rule satisfied on every ring final circuit. The 8 non-ring circuits are vacuously PASS.

N/A and trivially PASS per validator INV-15 wording — circuit.floor_area_m2 is not populated on any circuit (v2.0 optional field). The rule fires only when both floor_area_m2 AND rooms_covered[] are populated and demands Σ-tolerance reconciliation; with floor_area_m2 absent, no reconciliation is computed. The room dimensions in rooms[].dimensions_m carry the 600 m² floor total implicitly (16×10 + 16×10 + 4×(5×3.2) + 8×5 + 4×3 + 5×4 + 3×2 ≈ 478 m² of programmed space; remainder is circulation outside the small-power scope).

C01 and C02 are ring topology on 2.5 mm² + 1.5 mm² CPC PVC T+E with 32 A RCBO — matches the IET OSG App H ring final circuit recipe. C03–C06 are radial on 2.5 mm² + 1.5 mm² CPC PVC T+E with 20 A RCBO — radial OCPD sized by connected load per §433.1.1 (no ring recipe applies). C07 and C10 are dedicated_radial on 2.5 mm² + 1.5 mm² CPC PVC T+E with 32 A and 20 A RCBO respectively — dedicated_radial validator INV-16 wording trivially PASSes. C08 and C09 are dedicated_radial on 2.5 mm² + 1.5 mm² CPC PVC T+E with 16 A RCBO — same trivial PASS.

N/A and trivially PASS per validator INV-17 wording — no circuit has fcu_spurs[] populated as a schema-level circuits[].fcu_spurs[] array. The two FCUs in the kitchenette (under-counter fridge fixed feed + dishwasher fixed feed) are modelled as switched_connection_unit_13A_BS_EN_60669 socket entries with fed_by_spur=true under rooms[].kitchenette.sockets[] — they are NOT modelled on the circuits[].fcu_spurs[] AMD 2 path because C06 is a radial (not a ring) and the AMD 2 FCU-spur path applies to ring final circuits per IET OSG §8.4.4.

N/A and trivially PASS per validator INV-18 wording — no circuit carries ev_charge_metadata (no EV charging on this office floor). The schema's allOf clause #2 does not fire; INV-18 rule EV-03 evaluates only on circuits with load_type matching ev_charge_*.

FIRST EMIT of INV-19 PASS in the small-power skill. Both building_diversity.per_circuit_demand_inputs[] (10 entries) AND consumed_intents.cable_sizing.payload.circuits[] (10 entries) are populated. Reconciliation drift per circuit: C01 (19.8 vs 19.8 = 0.0%) / C02 (19.8 vs 19.8 = 0.0%) / C03 (7.2 vs 7.2 = 0.0%) / C04 (7.2 vs 7.2 = 0.0%) / C05 (5.4 vs 5.4 = 0.0%) / C06 (11.5 vs 11.5 = 0.0%) / C07 (19.8 vs 19.8 = 0.0%) / C08 (13.8 vs 13.8 = 0.0%) / C09 (13.8 vs 13.8 = 0.0%) / C10 (10.4 vs 10.4 = 0.0%). All 10 within ±5% tolerance. PASS.
